what-contentrain-manages.answer: Campaign messaging, collection composition, product copy, testimonials, navigation, and metadata are all driven from content models.
what-contentrain-manages.question: What does Contentrain manage here?

why-app-router.answer: It gives strong deployment defaults, server component rendering, and a clear path toward richer product detail and campaign surfaces.
why-app-router.question: Why Next App Router for commerce?
